capabilities.name: plugin-directory-layout
capabilities.description: New files are placed in the correct plugin directory: agents in agents/, skills in skills/<name>/, hooks in hooks/, scripts in scripts/, manifests in .claude-plugin/

capabilities.name: manifest-versioning
capabilities.description: plugin.json and marketplace.json versions are kept in sync across all three version fields, following semver conventions

capabilities.name: agent-frontmatter-format
capabilities.description: Agent markdown files use correct YAML frontmatter with name, description, model: inherit, maxTurns, color, and tools fields

capabilities.name: detect-verify-execute-workflow
capabilities.description: Agents follow the 6-step workflow: detect runner from lock files, verify setup via pyproject.toml, verify install, parse prompt, run codeflash with --worktree --no-pr, report results

capabilities.name: agent-error-handling
capabilities.description: Agents handle known error cases: exit 127 (not installed), missing config (codeflash init), no optimizations found (normal), broken test repair (normal)

capabilities.name: hooks-json-structure
capabilities.description: hooks.json uses correct structure with event name keys, hook groups array, type: command, ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} paths, and timeout in seconds

capabilities.name: suggest-script-flow
capabilities.description: suggest-optimize.sh follows the correct flow: HEAD tracking, duplicate check, Python file detection, config check, runner detection, jq JSON output

capabilities.name: hook-output-format
capabilities.description: Hook scripts emit JSON with hookSpecificOutput containing hookEventName and additionalContext wrapped in <user-prompt-submit-hook> tags
